general.name: mos_target_targeting_generation_to_carton_parquet
general.description: Mapping of SDSS-V targeting generations to cartons. A 'targeting_generation' describes a collection of versioned cartons, together with their robostrategy control parameters. This is a convenient way to describe the specific set of carton-versions that were used (and the way that they were treated) within any particular run of robostrategy. The dr20_targeting_generation_to_carton table describes a many-to-many relationship, connecting each targeting_generation to a set of entries in the dr20_carton table, as well as recording how those carton-versions were treated in the robostrategy code (i.e. the rs_stage and rs_active parameters). Taken together, the dr20_targeting_generation, dr20_targeting_generation_to_carton and dr20_targeting_generation_to_version tables duplicate, in a database form, the robostrategy carton configuration information available via the rsconfig product (https://github.com/sdss/rsconfig).
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_targeting_generation_to_carton.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pk.name: pk
pk.description: primary key for this table entry

generation_pk.name: generation_pk
generation_pk.description: primary key of an entry in the dr20_targeting_generation table

carton_pk.name: carton_pk
carton_pk.description: primary key of an entry in the dr20_carton table, i.e. a carton-version

rs_stage.name: rs_stage
rs_stage.description: the algorithimic stage of robostrategy in which targets from this carton-version are considered for assignment. Options: 'none', 'plates', 'srd', 'filler', or 'open'. See the robostrategy documentation for further information.

rs_active.name: rs_active
rs_active.description: a Boolean column describing whether the carton-version is considered within robostrategy
